panels.description: Medium shot: Justine stands before Frankenstein and Elizabeth in a somber, dimly lit room. She looks sincere and earnest. Elizabeth nods with a supportive expression. Victorian era clothing.

bubbles.text: I know you are innocent, Justine. We are all grateful for your kindness.

panels.description: Close up: Justine with a peaceful, resigned smile. Elizabeth is in the background, face buried in her hands, weeping. Soft, melancholic lighting.

bubbles.text: Justine found a tragic peace, while Elizabeth succumbed to the misery of innocence.

panels.description: Medium close up: Frankenstein looks tortured, hand clutching his chest as if in physical pain. Justine nearby tries to maintain a mask of cheerfulness, holding back tears.
Medium shot: Justine reaches out to hold Elizabeth's hand for a final farewell. A cold, institutional window behind them suggests a prison setting.

bubbles.text: Farewell, Elizabeth. May you always be happy and blessed.

panels.description: Wide shot: A dark, moody composition showing the silhouettes of Frankenstein and Elizabeth standing alone in a vast, empty courtroom. The cold, harsh architecture emphasizes their failure and profound isolation.

bubbles.text: The judges remained unmoved. The following day, Justine was gone. Only the weight of William's and Justine's deaths remained, settling into a dead, hollow silence.
